intro: Today we are ranking Banana as a fruit, per 100g, so you can see where it really lands.

sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.3g. omega 3 is absurdly strong. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.3g. omega 3 is absurdly strong. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 22.8g. fibre is seriously strong. for a fruit, this really comes down to sugar control.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 22.8g. fibre is seriously strong. for a fruit, this really comes down to sugar control.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 1.1g. the absorption case is very strong. for a fruit, sugar moderation is the whole game.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 1.1g. the absorption case is very strong. for a fruit, sugar moderation is the whole game.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 10% DV, vitamin a at 1% DV stand out most. everything else is fairly underwhelming.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 10% DV, vitamin a at 1% DV stand out most. everything else is fairly underwhelming.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 8% DV, magnesium at 7% DV stand out most. everything else is fairly underwhelming.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 8% DV, magnesium at 7% DV stand out most. everything else is fairly underwhelming.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: biggest pros here. very practical everyday fruit. often easy to tolerate. brings a useful potassium identity.

displayItems.title: very practical everyday fruit
displayItems.explanation: Cheap, portable, and easy to use, which matters for a fruit people actually eat often.

displayItems.title: often easy to tolerate
displayItems.explanation: A practical plus for many people compared with harsher foods.

displayItems.title: brings a useful potassium identity
displayItems.explanation: Not enough to make it elite, but still a real supportive strength.

sections.subtitleText: biggest pros here. very practical everyday fruit. often easy to tolerate. brings a useful potassium identity.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: biggest cons here. sugar load is fairly high. fibre is only modest. glycemic behaviour is only middling.

displayItems.title: sugar load is fairly high
displayItems.explanation: Less moderated than the best fruits.

displayItems.title: glycemic behaviour is only middling
displayItems.explanation: Not harsh, just not one of the cleanest fruits on this axis.

sections.subtitleText: biggest cons here. sugar load is fairly high. fibre is only modest. glycemic behaviour is only middling.

closing.summary: So overall, Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
closing.useCaseNote: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 32 from a base nutrition score of 29. Context lifted it by 3 points.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
